counters.description: outscales you hard, outtrades you also and has more dmg early
outdmg and outrange you and zones you with her plants making it hard to go in with your ult
outdmg you and makes your hp stacking useless
perma cc and nearly impossible to kill for you
outrange you, outdmg you, outscale you, she is a horror matchup. you can just hope that she makes mistakes so you can catch her

health% true dmg and high mobility. she dont outrange you like senna but  her passive alone counters you insane. try to be aggressive before she has 2 items and hold her down, otherwise you have no chance against her.
you will die if he runs at you, you have no counterplay, your slow dont work, he has more dps and you will simply destroy you
same as olaf just way more shields and speed. once he reached you you are propably dead in 1-2 seconds
its not fun to get oneshotted by 1 w : (

synergies.description: you provide her with everything she needs, frontline, cc and dmg
like samira but even better since she can amplify you heal and gives you aa immunity
you can act as her frontline and she can heal you from behind while and you both scale
good combos, high sustain and poke and ult combo
u give nothing to each other
useless together, can only work if enemy team has no synergy either
good slow for you to reach enemys
you pull enemy into her traps + good range
good combo cc and burst together
very nice if you have him as jng or top. you both have insane all-in potential and he can keep you alive with his cc/knockbacks so you will have the time to do max dmg.
very good if you have him in team, works the same way as maokai, he gives you so much cc and peel that you can deal tons of dmg and avoid getting focused
